topics.label: ABAP Workbench
topics.description: Use SE80 transaction in SAP. ABAP runs inside the SAP application server.

topics.label: Data Types & Variables
topics.description: DATA, TYPES, elementary types (i, string, d, t), structures, internal tables.

topics.label: Internal Tables
topics.description: Standard, sorted, hashed tables. LOOP AT, READ TABLE, APPEND, INSERT.

topics.label: Open SQL
topics.description: SELECT, INSERT, UPDATE, DELETE on SAP database tables. Integrated SQL.

topics.label: OOP in ABAP
topics.description: CLASS, METHOD, INTERFACE. Modern ABAP is fully object-oriented.

topics.label: ALV Reports
topics.description: Display data in grid reports with ALV (ABAP List Viewer).
